title: SHRED EVENT - 211info
text: MILWAUKIE COMMUNITY CENTER SHRED EVENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provide a safe and secure resource to shred confidential documents on-site. Also will take unwanted or expired medications for disposal. 5440 SE Kellogg Creek Drive Milwaukie, OR 97222 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday, June 11, 2026 10am-1pm (503) 653-8100 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 653-8100 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Services: Identity Theft Prevention Medication Disposal If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MILWAUKIE COMMUNITY CENTER
